description: FAIR dataset-level metadata for the CanadaScanada corpus. Follows DataCite conventions for machine-readability and research citation. Update 'date_modified' and 'version' on each corpus release.

identifier.note: Persistent identifier. Replace with a DOI once one is registered (e.g. via Zenodo). A DOI makes the dataset citeable in academic contexts and satisfies the FAIR 'globally unique persistent identifier' requirement.

title.en-CA: CanadaScanada: A sourced record of political events, statements, and policy actions in Alberta and Canada

creators.name: CanadaScanada Editorial
creators.note: Institutional voice only. No contributor names are exposed per the project's contributor-anonymity policy.

description.en-CA: A structured, per-file JSON corpus documenting political events, public statements, and policy actions in Alberta and Canada. Each record is source-cited, editorially gated, and cross-linked via a typed relation graph. The corpus supports bilingual (en-CA / fr-CA) rendering, counter-memo authoring, and public accountability explainers. Records follow schema version 3.0.0.

rights.rights_statement: Data and content are licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0). Scripts in the scripts/ directory are licensed under the MIT Licence. See LICENCE at the repository root.
rights.note: Licence confirmed as Decision 34. CC BY 4.0 was chosen to maximise FAIR reusability (research, journalism, civic tech) while requiring attribution. Non-commercial restriction was rejected as it would exclude academic and journalistic reuse.

dates.note: created is approximate project start. modified must be updated on each tagged release.

spatial_coverage.note: Events are primarily Alberta provincial politics. Federal events are included where they interact with provincial jurisdiction or Alberta political actors.

temporal_coverage.note: Earliest events document the pre-UCP period. Corpus is actively maintained.

contact.note: Contact details to be added post-launch per the project's contributor-anonymity policy.

citation.template: CanadaScanada Editorial. ({year}). CanadaScanada: A sourced record of political events, statements, and policy actions in Alberta and Canada [Dataset]. CanadaScanada. https://canadascanada.ca
citation.note: Replace {year} with the year of the specific corpus version cited. Once a DOI is registered, append it: https://doi.org/10.XXXX/XXXXXX

findable.F4_indexed: pending — Zenodo, Google Dataset Search registration post-launch

accessible.A2_metadata_persistent: yes — this file remains even if data moves

interoperable.I2_uses_fair_vocabularies: partial — custom vocab in meta/; Dublin Core / DataCite for this file

reusable.R1_2_provenance: yes — update_log, source_refs, submission_source on every record
reusable.R1_3_meets_community_standards: partial — no formal domain standard yet; DataCite for this file
